title: Eternal Starlight Addon: Eternal Glow
description: An add-on that adds several new colored light blocks crafted from crystals and crystal moss.
body:
A small addon for [Eternal Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-starlight) that adds 9 new light blocks. Recipes are crystals and glowstone dust or crystal moss carpets and shroomlight. Neoforge version made with Mcreator. 

Update: Fabric version is also available, now without using mcreator!
